tool_purpose: A speech-to-speech translation model with two-pass decoder (UnitY) trained on Hokkien-English data from TED, drama, and TAT domains. It uses Facebook's Unit HiFiGAN for speech synthesis. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/xm_transformer_unity_hk-en').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: A speech-to-speech translation model with two-pass decoder (UnitY) trained on Hokkien-English data from TED, drama, and TAT domains. It uses Facebook's Unit HiFiGAN for speech synthesis. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/xm_transformer_unity_hk-en').
